---
title: "Week 03"
---

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Monday (02/23)
:::

**Topics**

-   Method of Moments
-   Bias of an estimator

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by **10:00am**

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_06.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   Method of Moments [practice problems](class/06_MM.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Wednesday (02/25)
:::

**Topics**

-   Bias (cont.)
-   Mean squared error of an estimator

**Daily assignment**

None!

**Class activity**

-   Bias [practice problems](class/08_bias.pdf)
-   MSE [visualization](class/mse_viz.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Friday (02/27)
:::

**Topics**

-   Mean squared error (cont.)

**Daily assignment**

Nothing official. Just review your notes from last class!

**Class activity**

-   MSE practice problems
